title: Hollywood Cavalcade
director: Irving Cummings, Buster Keaton, Malcolm St. Clair
writer: Ernest Pascal, Hilary Lynn, Brown Holmes
actors: Alice Faye, Don Ameche, J. Edward Bromberg
plot: Starting in 1913 movie director Connors discovers singer Molly Adair. As she becomes a star she marries an actor, so Connors fires them. She asks for him as director of her next film. Many silent stars shown making the transition ...
